svg.title: KubeSentinel Layer 1 — Static Policy Engine
svg.desc: Linear pipeline from YAML/Helm input through Manifest Ingestor, AST Parser, Rules Engine, to Enforcement Controller which branches into Pass (deploy allowed) or Block (deploy rejected with violation report).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What YAML and Helm manifest formats does KubeSentinel accept?')
sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel scanner.go manifest ingestor work?')
g.text: Discovers YAML/YML files · resolves Helm templates

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the AST parser extract from Kubernetes manifests?')
g.text: Parses K8s resource objects · extracts fields

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the KubeSentinel rules engine evaluate security policies?')
sendPrompt('What happens after KubeSentinel passes a manifest with no violations?')
sendPrompt('What does KubeSentinel do when it blocks a deployment?')
